title: LiPo to 3.3 V rail for ESP32-C3
prompt: I'm powering an ESP32-C3 from a single-cell LiPo (3.0-4.2 V). Add a 3.3 V regulator that takes the battery in and produces a clean 3.3 V rail, and power the ESP32-C3 from that rail. Size the regulator so it can comfortably supply the ESP32's peak current. For the bench check assume a full 4.2 V battery.
